# Pull Request Template

### Summary
Briefly describe the change and the reason for it.

### Checklist
- [ ] The title is descriptive and prefixed (feat/fix/docs/chore)
- [ ] Tests added or existing tests updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Linting passed (`npm run lint` and `npm run lint:css`) or issues documented
- [ ] Screenshots included for UI changes (if applicable)
- [ ] The change is scoped to a single purpose

### How to test
Provide steps to reproduce and verify the change locally.

### Notes for reviewers
Anything reviewers should pay special attention to (dangerous refactors, class renames, API changes).
